ogTitle: Tuan Forest vs Tuchekoi: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tuan Forest and Tuchekoi.
heading: Tuan Forest vs Tuchekoi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tuan Forest, Queensland and Tuchekoi, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tuan Forest and Tuchekoi have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Tuan Forest or Tuchekoi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tuan Forest has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Tuchekoi scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tuan Forest scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Tuchekoi scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tuan Forest or Tuchekoi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tuan Forest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
